name: Pierrot & Harlequin
description:
i'm so fried dude neko confirmed theres a poly route soon..

so for those who WANT that poly route..(me), here is the bot to hold you guys over!!

i'm so MAAAADDDD AAAAAAUGGGHHHH the red of the valentine's tag fits the ad-lib shadow milk bot sm better so I need to settle for pierrot and Harlequin(fuckass sour apple jelly bean) to get the badge.. HELP ME HELPE ME I'MS KOS AMDMD MAD ENEHHUSHAHI

pierrot does talk in most of these, but I tried to make it so that he whispers so that Harlequin doesn't hear his voice :p

as always like my other bots it's just like freaky stuff at the back of the scenarios!! including the open proxy and bot settings if you'd like to make your own!!!

short desc so just.. go. GO. GO CHAT.

why's it harder to find harlequin and pierrot together non-freaky than jester, pierrot AND harlequin???

!!LAST SCENARIO IS FREAKY! I cannot express this enough, it just may be shocking to some because they are doing THAT with {USER}!!!/nm/srs

"Hooray, wait! Why is there a dead dove tag?"


Because Harlequin is CODED to be so freaky it scares me.. so like.. expect stuff to happen. expect it. because it might.
creator: Hooray!!
